channel.title: Claude on Badran Elshenawy
channel.description: Recent content in Claude on Badran Elshenawy

item.title: Claude Series – Post 14: The Complete Claude Code Toolkit - A Series Retrospective!
item.description: Post 14 in the Claude series. The capstone — a full retrospective covering every post, lessons learned about bridging technical and non-technical audiences, and why AI-assisted research is becoming infrastructure.

item.title: Claude Series – Post 13: claude-mem - Give Claude Code a Brain That Remembers!
item.description: Post 13 in the Claude series. Every Claude Code session starts from zero — claude-mem fixes that with automatic context capture, AI compression, and token-efficient progressive disclosure search.

item.title: Claude Series – Post 12: I Built Custom Claude Code Skills for Bioinformatics - And Open-Sourced Them!
item.description: Post 12 in the Claude series. Moving from the concept of Skills (Post 6) to a real implementation — five opinionated, interconnected Skills for R, scRNA-seq, and scientific documentation, with BadranSeq baked in as the default visualization layer.

item.title: Claude Series – Post 11: How Claude Code Made Me Actually Love Version Control!
item.description: Version control was always the part of research coding I avoided doing well. Claude Code’s natural language git and gh integration removed every point of friction - and the impact on my reproducibility practices has been transformative.

item.title: Claude Series – Post 10: Superpowers - The Plugin That Changes Everything!
item.description: Stop letting Claude dump unplanned, untested code! Superpowers enforces a complete software development methodology - brainstorm, plan, test-first implementation, and continuous review - transforming your AI coding workflow permanently.

item.title: Claude Series – Post 9: Plugins - The App Store Claude Code Was Missing!
item.description: Stop configuring everything manually! Claude Code’s plugin ecosystem gives you 9,000+ one-command installs that bundle skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers - from automated code review to real-time documentation injection.

item.title: Claude Series – Post 8: Subagents - Your Terminal Now Has a Whole AI Team!
item.description: Stop working sequentially! Learn how Claude Code subagents let you spawn parallel AI specialists - each with its own context window and expertise - to explore, review, test, and document your bioinformatics code simultaneously.

item.title: Claude Series – Post 7: MCPs - Claude Just Learned To Talk To EVERYTHING!
item.description: Stop copy-pasting between tools! Learn how MCP turns Claude into a fully connected research assistant that can search PubMed, manage GitHub repos, access Google Drive, and interact with your entire research ecosystem - all from one terminal.

item.title: Claude Series – Post 6: Skills - Turn Claude Into YOUR Specialist!
item.description: Stop repeating yourself every session! Learn how Claude Skills let you package your expertise, protocols, and standards into reusable modules that Claude loads automatically - from built-in document creation to custom bioinformatics workflows and the Superpowers marketplace.
